title: CSV Import
subtitle: Import transactions from CSV files
upload.title: Upload CSV File
upload.dropzone: Drop CSV file here or click to browse
upload.errors.invalidFile: This file doesn't look like a CSV. Please upload a .csv file.
upload.errors.tooLarge: File is too large. The maximum size is 100 MB.
upload.errors.binary: This file looks binary, not text. Please upload a plain-text .csv file.
upload.warnings.title: This file doesn't look like a transaction CSV
upload.warnings.singleColumn: Only one column was detected. Check the delimiter or format settings.
upload.warnings.noDate: No column in the sample could be parsed as a date. Check the date format.
upload.warnings.noAmount: No column in the sample could be parsed as a number. Check the decimal separator.
upload.warnings.noRows: No data rows were detected. The file may be empty.
columns.title: Map Columns
columns.description: Assign each CSV column to the corresponding field
securities.title: Match Securities
securities.description: Match CSV securities to existing ones or create new
securities.picker.label: Securities account
securities.picker.description: This portfolio has multiple securities accounts. Choose which one the import targets.
securities.currency.label: Currency
preview.title: Preview & Confirm
result.allDuplicates: All {{count}} rows were duplicates — nothing to import
prices.title: Import Historical Prices
errors.missingShares: Shares required for this transaction type
errors.invalidPrice: Price must be greater than zero
errors.fxRateRequired: Exchange rate is required for cross-currency rows
errors.fxVerificationFailed: Gross × Rate does not match Value (cross-currency check failed)
errors.currencyMismatch: Currency '{{value}}' does not match the security's currency
errors.insufficientShares: Selling more shares than available at that point in time
errors.tempExpired: Session expired. Please re-upload the file.
errors.importInProgress: Another import is currently in progress. Please wait.
errors.invalidFile: Invalid file format. Please upload a CSV file.
errors.invalidSecuritiesAccount: This portfolio isn't ready to receive imports. Please set up its securities account and cash account before retrying.
errors.noReferenceAccount: This portfolio has no linked cash account. Please add one before importing.
errors.previewFailed: Preview failed. Please go back and verify your column mapping, or try again.
errors.importFailed: Import failed. Please go back and check your data, or try again.
